name: Interaction Prompt
description: A contextual UI cue that tells the player an object, character, or action can be used.
design_notes: Interaction prompts connect world affordances to input. They should prioritize nearby candidates, show the correct binding, and avoid flickering when multiple objects overlap.
design_purpose: Reveal available interactions at the right moment.
Support keyboard, gamepad, touch, and remapped controls.
player_fantasy: The player feels the world is readable and responsive to their intent.

parameters.name: prompt_activation_distance
parameters.description: Distance where a candidate can show a prompt.

parameters.name: candidate_priority_rule
parameters.description: Rule used to choose among overlapping interactions.

parameters.name: prompt_fade_ms
parameters.description: Fade window for prompt appearance and disappearance.

parameters.name: hold_confirm_ms
parameters.description: Optional hold requirement for risky interactions.

edge_cases: Multiple interactables in one area need stable selection and cycling.
Prompts must update after control remapping or device change.
Dangerous interactions may need confirmation while normal pickups do not.
common_bugs: Prompt displays one binding while input system expects another.
Prompt flickers at distance boundary without hysteresis.
Interact target changes after button press but before action resolves.
balancing_notes: Too many prompts create UI noise; too few make affordances invisible.
Hold prompts should be reserved for actions that need confirmation.
accessibility_notes: Support text scaling, input glyph alternatives, and optional hold-to-toggle behavior for long interactions.

implementation_notes.unity: Query interactable components each frame or fixed cadence, choose one candidate, and bind prompt glyphs through the active input scheme.
implementation_notes.godot: Use Area nodes or raycasts to collect candidates and update a Control node with localized action labels.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use interfaces or gameplay tags for interactables and CommonUI or UMG widgets for platform-specific input glyphs.
implementation_notes.web: Maintain interactable candidates in game state and render prompts from current input mapping and focus target.
